testing_centers.notes: Computer-based testing at Pearson VUE authorized test centers. Online proctoring available for some exams.

id_requirements: One government-issued photo ID with full name. Name must match AHIMA registration exactly.
exam_rules: Closed-book. No notes or reference materials. On-screen calculator available. CCS exam includes medical record coding section using actual patient records presented on screen.
renewal_options: Complete required CEUs (Continuing Education Units) every 2 years and pay annual certification maintenance fee. CEUs earned through AHIMA-approved education, conferences, and professional activities.

prerequisites.description: No formal prerequisites; experience in coding ICD-10-CM/PCS and CPT codes strongly recommended

retake_policy.notes: 60-day waiting period between attempts. Full exam fee required for retake.

official_study_resources.title: AHIMA Exam Prep
official_study_resources.notes: Official study guides published by AHIMA Press for each credential
